jobs.name: NAMA-Sentinel-Hourly-Check
jobs.description: NAMA Sentinel Bot: Automated hourly system health check and email reporting.

payload.message:
Run the NAMA Sentinel Bot (nama_sentinel.py). 
1. Execute: `python3 nama_sentinel.py`.
2. Read the results from `nama_sentinel_report.txt`.
3. Use the `mcp_call` tool (Gmail toolkit) to send the content of the report to 'narayan.mallapur@gmail.com' with the subject 'NAMA Sentinel: System Health Update'.
4. If there are failures, mark it as 'CRITICAL' in the subject.
5. Provide a summary of the run in the chat.
